# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app1.example.com
        - https://app2.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - Access-Control-Request-Method
        - Access-Control-Request-Headers
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Response-Time
        - X-Request-ID
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
    service:
      id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
      run_on_preflight: true
      anonymous: ""
      key_claim_name: sub
    service:
      id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 100
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      day: 100000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
      identifier: consumer
      redis_host: redis
      redis_port: 6379
      redis_timeout: 2000
      redis_database: 0
      redis_password: ""
      redis_ssl: false
      redis_ssl_verify: false
      redis_ssl_cert: ""
      redis_ssl_key: ""
      redis_ssl_ca_cert: ""
    service:
      id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1

  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Response-Time
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true
    service:
      id: service-2

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
      run_on_preflight: true
      anonymous: ""
    service:
      id: service-2

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 50
      minute: 500
      hour: 5000
      policy: local
      limit_by: consumer
    service:
      id: service-2
